user_query: I'm planning a trip to Tokyo and I need the address information for the postal code 1510053. Additionally, I would like to know the nearest cities to Tokyo for accommodation options. Can you provide me with the details of the nearest 3 cities and their distances from Tokyo? Lastly, please fetch the timezone information for Tokyo to ensure I have accurate local time during my trip.

TaskList.description: Fetch address information for the postal code 1510053 in Tokyo.
Retrieve the nearest 3 cities to Tokyo and their distances for accommodation options.
Get the timezone information for Tokyo to ensure accurate local time.
